task_completion.description: Use VeraCrypt to restore the volume header from the backup file
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt GUI showing the 'Volume Tools' -> 'Restore Volume Header' dialog, or a success message indicating the header for '/home/ga/Volumes/critical_data.hc' was restored using the external backup file.

task_completion.description: Mount the restored volume to the specified mount point
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing '/home/ga/Volumes/critical_data.hc' successfully mounted at the directory '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1'.

task_completion.description: Locate the RECOVERY_VERIFICATION.txt file inside the mounted volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing the contents of '/home/ga/MountPoints/slot1', including the file 'RECOVERY_VERIFICATION.txt'.

task_completion.description: Create the recovery report file in the Documents directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a file named 'recovery_report.txt' being created or edited in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

task_completion.description: Write the verification code as the first line of the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor showing 'recovery_report.txt' with its first line exactly matching the recovery code: 'VERIFIED-DR-7F3A9B2E-OK'.

task_completion.description: List all filenames found in the root of the mounted volume in the subsequent lines of the report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor showing 'recovery_report.txt' containing the filenames 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt', 'FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv', 'backup_authorized_keys', and 'RECOVERY_VERIFICATION.txt' on the lines following the verification code.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the VeraCrypt GUI to perform the restoration and mounting
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the VeraCrypt application window open and being actively interacted with (e.g., selecting volume tools, entering the password in the mount dialog).

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the verification file to read the code
integrity.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing 'RECOVERY_VERIFICATION.txt' open in a text editor or terminal viewer (like cat or less) displaying the code before it is written to the report.

integrity.description: The report file was created using a text editor or terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or terminal window showing the active editing or creation of the report, rather than the file appearing without any visible creation process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/critical_data.hc. Backup path: /home/ga/Volumes/header_backup_critical.dat. Mount point: /home/ga/MountPoints/slot1. Password: DR-Restore#2024!. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/recovery_report.txt. Recovery code (must be line 1 of report): VERIFIED-DR-7F3A9B2E-OK. Expected files in root (must be listed in report): SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt, FY2024_Revenue_Budget.csv, backup_authorized_keys, RECOVERY_VERIFICATION.txt.
